HomePage.title: mytripfy
HomePage.description: World's Best Companion and Local Guide Travel Platform

Hero.subtitle: Find your perfect travel companion or local guide anywhere in the world.
Hero.features: Verified profiles · Community reviews · Real-time chat

HomeSection.latestSubtitle: Recently posted — join before they fill up
HomeSection.firstToPost: Be the first to post a trip!
HomeSection.guidesSubtitle: Trusted locals ready to show you around
HomeSection.featuresSubtitle: From finding travel partners to local experts — mytripfy has it all, completely free.
HomeSection.ctaSubtitle: Join travelers on mytripfy — completely free.
HomeSection.footerTagline: World's best travel companion platform. Find companions, local guides, and make every journey unforgettable.
HomeSection.guideRequestsSubtitle: Travelers looking for a local guide — apply now!
HomeSection.featureFindCompanionsDesc: Post your trip or browse others. Filter by destination, dates and travel style. Connect with travelers heading the same way.
HomeSection.featureFindGuidesDesc: Local guides who know hidden spots. Filter by country, language, vehicle or accommodation. Book with trust scores and reviews.
HomeSection.featureGuideRequestsDesc: Need a guide? Post your dates and destination. Guides apply to host you — pick the best match and chat to plan.
HomeSection.featureSponsorsDesc: Partner stores, cafes and experiences offer mytripfy-only discounts. Visit and certify with a photo to earn bonus points.
HomeSection.featureChallengesDesc: Complete bucket-list challenges (countries, foods, attractions). Upload proof, earn points and climb the community feed.
HomeSection.featureHallOfFameDesc: Experience ranking (challenge points) and contribution ranking (guides, companions, reviews). See top travelers and earn tiers.
HomeSection.featureLevelBadgesDesc: Earn trust points and level up from Rookie to World Conqueror. Unlock badges that show on your profile and in search.
HomeSection.featureChatDesc: DM companions and guides, or join group chats for trips. Built-in translation helps break language barriers.
HomeSection.featureVerifiedDesc: Email and optional verification, plus community reviews after trips. Know who you are traveling with.
HomeSection.howStep1Desc: Sign up free, add travel history, get verified, earn your trust badge.
HomeSection.howStep2Desc: Browse companion requests or post your own trip. Filter by destination and purpose.
HomeSection.howStep3Desc: Meet your match, have an amazing trip, leave a review to build community trust.
HomeSection.footerRightsContact: For inquiries, please email swbaek60@gmail.com (Harry Baek).
HomeSection.searchHint: Try: Japan · Thailand · Italy · Seoul · London

Privacy.intro: mytripfy ("we", "our", or "the Service") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have. By using mytripfy, you agree to this policy.
Privacy.s1Body:
We collect the following types of information:
• Account information: name, email address, profile photo, and password (stored securely via Supabase Auth).
• Profile information: nationality, travel level, biography, and any other details you choose to add.
• Travel content: companion posts, guide requests, trip records, reviews, and challenge certifications you create.
• Usage data: pages visited, search queries, and interactions within the Service (collected via server logs).
• Device information: browser type, operating system, IP address, and language settings.
Privacy.s2Body:
We use the information we collect to:
• Provide and operate the mytripfy platform.
• Match you with travel companions and local guides.
• Send service notifications, application updates, and messages within the platform.
• Improve our features and user experience.
• Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, or violations of our Terms of Service.
• Comply with applicable legal obligations.
Privacy.s3Body:
We do not sell your personal information. We may share information in the following circumstances:
• With other users: your public profile, posts, and reviews are visible to other registered users.
• With service providers: we use Supabase (database & auth), Vercel (hosting), and similar infrastructure providers who process data on our behalf under confidentiality agreements.
• For legal reasons: we may disclose information if required by law or to protect the rights and safety of our users.
• Business transfers: in the event of a merger or acquisition, your data may be transferred to the new entity.
Privacy.s4Body: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the Service. If you request account deletion, we will delete your personal information within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.
Privacy.s5Body:
You have the right to:
• Access the personal data we hold about you.
• Correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
• Request deletion of your account and personal data.
• Withdraw consent for optional data uses.
• Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

To exercise these rights, please contact us at swbaek60@gmail.com.
Privacy.s6Body: mytripfy uses cookies and browser local storage to maintain your session, remember your language and currency preferences, and improve site performance. You can control cookie settings through your browser. Disabling cookies may affect some features of the Service.
Privacy.s7Body: We implement industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption, access controls, and secure password hashing. However, no online service can guarantee absolute security. Please use a strong, unique password and contact us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access to your account.
Privacy.s8Body: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., social media profiles, external guides). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies before sharing any information.
Privacy.contactBody: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us:
